name: braillewright
description: Accessibility CI tooling for the Braillewright theme + Braillewright Pro plugin: a local WordPress (wp-env) running the theme + plugin, scanned with pa11y-ci (axe + HTML_CodeSniffer) and Lighthouse CI.

scripts.env:activate: wp-env run cli wp theme activate braillewright && wp-env run cli wp plugin activate braillewright-pro
scripts.a11y: npm run a11y:pa11y && npm run a11y:lighthouse
